reviews.review_title: A FESTIVE & FUN VR COOKING ADVENTURE
reviews.review_description: Mars Kitchen – Christmas Special brings joyful holiday flair to the classic Mars Kitchen experience. Creative cooking, chaotic challenges, and festive energy make this VR sandbox game a delight for players of all ages. Engaging, accessible, and full of personality — perfect for seasonal play!

I bought. And  played many cooking and bartender games ...and this game is definitely one of the best. The cartoonish style is nice and with plenty of details. Physic is well made and the gameplay is well balanced. There are plenty of things to cook.this game will keep you busy for a lot of time. Definitely recommended if you want to have fun

I can see the idea, creative and fun.
Can be chaotic with everything floating around but you can turn that setting off. 

Will try beat all levels with gravity first, get used to the orders.

The cooking tutorial is unique, you turn over an object and it shows you the ingredients.

The graphics are cool, had slight issue opening the rice cooker 🤣 but it's all good.

reviews.review_title: Out of This World Cooking Fun!
reviews.review_description: Mars Kitchen is a blast! Cooking in zero gravity feels chaotic in the best way possible, and the VR immersion makes it hilarious and addictive. The physics are spot-on, the challenges are fun, and it’s the perfect mix of silly and strategic. Whether you’re flipping burgers on Mars or trying to keep floating ingredients under control, it never stops being entertaining. Easily one of the most creative and fun VR cooking games I’ve played.  To be honest it took me a while before I knew what I was doing, top tip follow the tutorial!!

This is a physical, move about cooking game.
Various customers enter your restaurant with their demands, look up the recipe and get cooking grabbing the ingredients around you and using the various machines to chop, grind, mix and cook… each customers need has a time limit that you need to try reach.

Love the graphics style and the humour… even has a retro touch to it. 
Sounds and speech is also cool too!

It’s a fun game that could also give you the added bonus of a little work out.
You do need room around you to play as it involves moving about, as you can’t use the sticks to move around the kitchen area.

Cute and fun game for all the family

This is a carbon copy of a few games like this 
Take orders 
Make orders
It has a good graphical feel to it, doesn’t take it too seriously and seems like it will be a good laugh, I’m only just into it so this is an early impression review and will revisit when I have gone in further, so far so good.

GREAT GAME! Took me awhile to get the controls right but the Devs are extremely helpful. The game is just as fun as I hoped. Shoutout to Andrea C.! Taco Studios give this man a raise! For his great patience! Definitely a big help and now I can enjoy the game more I can’t wait to play more levels! It’s already one of my favorite VR games.

developer_response.body: Hey Space Chef! We're reaching out through your Horizon Account chat to help fix the issues you reported. Don’t worry,  we’ll get everything resolved for you!

reviews.review_description: Fun so far, but I am stuck at level 19/20 of the pizzeria, after i pick up the phone, the robot comes in but then nothing happens!

developer_response.body: Hey Space Chef! It was an issue fixed overnight, you can now complete the quest and move on in the game.

reviews.review_description: Amazing game i will 100% play this everyday best kitchen game in vr the game is just great
THIS GAME IS SO FUN I LOVE IT SO MUCH YOU HAVE TO PLAY THIS !!!
Honestly, it's a hidden gem , for such a low price, buy it, you won't regret it.
This game is definitely worth the money! Was very fun to play. Just be aware you might spend too much time one here!
Try out your chef skills in space! Kids will love this one also 😜

Mars Kitchen delivers a creative, immersive VR experience where humans cook Earth food for curious Martian aliens. From the start, the game grabs you with a fun intro and well-designed tutorial that sets the tone for a hilarious and chaotic journey.

What makes it shine is the freedom to play it your way—go in as a serious chef or embrace total mayhem with silly, over-the-top behaviour. The cooking mechanics are rich and satisfying, with a huge variety of ingredients and recipes to explore. Every action, from chopping to plating, feels tactile and engaging.

Extra touches like disabling gravity, launching party mode, or setting off the alarm in the control room add unexpected fun. With different types of restaurants and dishes to master, Mars Kitchen offers excellent replayability and hours of laughter-filled gameplay. Game is early access and is already nicely polished so players can expect much more soon!

developer_response.body:
Hey Space Chef!

Thank you so much for your review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game. Our team is hard at work cooking up even more exciting content for the future — stay tuned!

See you on Mars! 🚀

reviews.review_description:
This game is really fun and immersive. I really enjoy the graphics, the cute Martians, witty banter, and preparing all of the food. The music is also good.

However, if there could be a way to move the counter (working space) up and down, that would be great. 

Also, how do I save progress? I've only played the first level for a few minutes at a time, but it keeps starting me over because I don't know where/how to save my progress.

developer_response.body:
Hey Space Chef!

Thank you for the feedback! We just added this suggestion to our backlog :) The progresses are automatically saved every time you finish a quest, you can use the slider in the Control Room to choose from which quest to start over!

See you on Mars!

reviews.review_description:
Looove this game already! 
There’s a lot of interactions possible which makes it very engaging. Love the vibes and the style too. 
Super easy to follow the quests and accessible to all. 
A 12$ super well invested - don’t miss out on this one!!

developer_response.body:
Hey Space Chef!

Thank you so much for your review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game. Our team is hard at work cooking up even more exciting content for the future — stay tuned!

See you on Mars! 🚀

reviews.review_description: Played this title tonight with the kids n a friend, it's a lot of fun. For the player and whoever looks at. We reached the Food Truck and it is a banger, all those aliens are crazy! A lot of stuff to do even in early access!

developer_response.body:
Hey Space Chef!

The aliens in the Food Truck are crazy indeed. But the next ones are even more strange!
Thanks for your support!

See you on Mars!

reviews.review_description: I love the game, its really fun, just wish it had something to help when youre confused and sometimes things get a little stuck but could be my own doing lol I dont regret buying it

developer_response.body:
Hey Space Chef!

Thank you for your support and feedback! If you have any other feedback, please join our Discord!

See you on Mars!

reviews.review_description: Really fun game ngl, good cooking system and funny random moments, full of brillliant ideas. Really hope something else coming for this title. 10/10 recommended

Thank you for your support! Stay tuned for the next updates!

reviews.review_description: Good fun
Super game! Really cool, nice design of all the kitchens, a lot of stuff to cook and a lot of funny things that you meet during the game :) THROW THE THINGS ✨

Glad you like the pizzeria! The next kitchens are super fun too!
